objective: Clean safe stale local hldpro-governance linked worktrees after lane-guard rollout without touching active lanes.
scope_boundary: Record live local worktree, remote branch, and GitHub issue state.
Remove only clean linked worktrees whose remote branch is gone and whose governing issue is closed.
Preserve primary, dirty, open-issue, current, and live-remote worktrees.
Update issue-specific planning, validation, closeout, backlog, and progress mirrors.
out_of_scope: Mutating issue #403 or any open backlog lane.
Changing GitHub org or repository settings.
Starting the next backlog implementation issue.
research_summary: Issue #400 verified the lane guard and recorded stale worktree candidates. This slice applies the cleanup with a fail-closed rule that keeps active and ambiguous lanes intact.

sprints.name: Stale linked-worktree cleanup
sprints.goal: Remove only closed/gone/clean linked worktrees while preserving active lanes.
tasks: Create issue-backed PDCAR, structured plan, and lane-claimed execution scope.
Run safe `git worktree remove` commands for approved candidates.
Update backlog/progress mirrors and closeout evidence.
Run local and GitHub validation before merge.
acceptance_criteria: Decision matrix documents keep/remove reasoning for every governance worktree.
Only clean closed/gone linked worktrees are removed.
Execution-scope and Local CI validation pass.

specialist_reviews.focus: Avoid cross-session lane deletion by requiring clean, closed, gone, linked worktree evidence.
specialist_reviews.summary: The cleanup rule is intentionally conservative and preserves dirty, open, primary, current, and live-remote worktrees.

alternate_model_review.summary: No coding subagent could be spawned because the agent pool was already at its configured limit; cleanup was reviewed locally against live status evidence.

execution_handoff.approved_scope_summary: Issue #405 may update planning/scope/validation/closeout artifacts, backlog/progress mirrors, generated closeout graph/wiki artifacts, and local linked worktree state for approved cleanup candidates only.
execution_handoff.next_execution_step: Remove approved clean stale linked worktrees, record after evidence, and run validation.

material_deviation_rules: Do not remove the primary hldpro-governance worktree.
Do not remove worktrees with live remote branches.
Do not start any backlog implementation issue from this lane.
